emails.subject: Phone Call From Rod Wright
emails.body: Jeff to keep you on point for this, why don't you send them Skilling's/Lay's name as primary and Kean as alternate. Forwarded by David Parquet/SF/ECT on 01/06/2001 07:28 AM "Julee Malinowski-Ball" <jmball@ns.net> 01/05/2001 04:44 PM Please respond to "Julee Malinowski-Ball"
